prosperity.example: Everyone hopes for peace and prosperity.
prosperity.example_zh: 每個人都希望和平與繁榮。

prosperous.example: They live in a prosperous city.
prosperous.example_zh: 他們住在一座繁榮的城市。

protein.example: Eggs are a good source of protein.
protein.example_zh: 蛋是很好的蛋白質來源。

protest.example: People gathered to protest the new law.
protest.example_zh: 人們聚集起來抗議新法。

protest.example: They held a protest outside city hall.
protest.example_zh: 他們在市政廳外舉行抗議。

psychologist.example: The psychologist helped her with her fears.
psychologist.example_zh: 心理學家幫助她處理恐懼。

psychology.example_zh: 她正在研究兒童心理學。

publicity.example: The movie got a lot of publicity.
publicity.example_zh: 這部電影得到了大量的宣傳。

publish.example: She will publish her first novel soon.
publish.example_zh: 她很快就要出版第一本小說。

publisher.example: The publisher printed thousands of copies.

pursue.example: She decided to pursue her dream.
pursue.example_zh: 她決定追求自己的夢想。

pursuit.example: He spends his life in the pursuit of knowledge.

quarrel.example: The two friends had a quarrel.

quilt.example: Grandma made a warm quilt for me.
quilt.example_zh: 奶奶為我做了一床溫暖的被子。

quotation.example: He began his speech with a quotation.
quotation.example_zh: 他以一段引言開始演講。

quotation.example: The builder sent us a quotation.
quotation.example_zh: 建商寄給我們一份報價單。

radar.example: The ship was tracked by radar.

rage.example: He shook with rage at the unfair result.
rage.example_zh: 對於不公的結果他氣得發抖。

rainfall.example: The rainfall this year was very low.

raisin.example: She added raisins to the bread.
raisin.example_zh: 她在麵包裡加了葡萄乾。

realistic.example: Set realistic goals you can reach.
realistic.example_zh: 設定你能達成的實際目標。

rebel.example: The people rebelled against the unfair king.
rebel.example_zh: 人民起來反抗不公的國王。

rebel.example: The rebels took control of the town.

recall.example: The company recalled the unsafe toys.
recall.example_zh: 公司召回了不安全的玩具。

reception.example: We waited at the hotel reception.

recipe.example: She followed a recipe to bake the cake.

recognition.example: She received recognition for her work.

recovery.example: His recovery from the illness was slow.

recreation.example_zh: 閱讀是一種放鬆的消遣。

reduction.example: There was a reduction in prices this week.

refer.example: Please refer to page ten for details.

reference.example: She used a book as a reference.

reflect.example: The calm lake reflected the mountains.
His grades reflect his hard work.
reflect.example_zh: 他的成績反映出他的努力。

reflection.example: She saw her reflection in the window.
reflection.example_zh: 她看見自己在窗上的倒影。

reform.example: The school made reforms to improve teaching.
reform.example_zh: 學校進行了改革以改善教學。

refugee.example_zh: 這個國家接納了許多難民。

refund.example: They gave me a refund for the broken toy.
refund.example_zh: 他們為壞掉的玩具退錢給我。

refusal.example_zh: 他的拒絕讓大家很驚訝。

regarding.example: I have a question regarding the trip.
regarding.example_zh: 我有個關於這趟旅行的問題。

register.example: Please register for the class online.
She wrote her name in the register.
register.example_zh: 她在登記簿上寫下名字。

regulate.example: The law regulates how shops can sell.
regulate.example_zh: 法律規範商店的販售方式。

regulation.example: We must follow the safety regulations.
regulation.example_zh: 我們必須遵守安全規定。

rejection.example: She handled the rejection with grace.

relaxation.example: A warm bath is good for relaxation.
relaxation.example_zh: 泡個熱水澡有助於放鬆。

reluctant.example: He was reluctant to ask for help.

remark.example: She made a kind remark about my work.
remark.example_zh: 她對我的作品說了句好話。

remark.example: He remarked that the food was good.

remedy.example: Honey is a home remedy for a sore throat.
remedy.example_zh: 蜂蜜是治喉嚨痛的居家療法。
我們必須補救這個錯誤。

renew.example: I need to renew my library card.
renew.example_zh: 我需要更新我的借書證。

representation.example: The map is a representation of the city.
representation.example_zh: 地圖是這座城市的呈現。

reputation.example: The restaurant has a good reputation.

rescue.example_zh: 消防員救出了受困的貓。
這次救援花了好幾個小時。

research.example: She does research on ocean animals.

research.example_zh: 他仔細研究了這個主題。

researcher.example_zh: 那名研究員發表了她的研究結果。

reservation.example: I made a reservation for two.
She had some reservations about the plan.
reservation.example_zh: 她對這個計畫有些疑慮。
